D1 Optics L3 Apply Reference

E and B Vector Pair

rotate a propagating wave and watch E and B oscillate perpendicular to each other

A plane electromagnetic wave carries an electric field E and a magnetic field B that oscillate in perpendicular planes, both transverse to the direction of travel.

Slide the frequency. The crimson E vector oscillates vertically (y), the gold B vector oscillates out-of-page (z), and both ride the +x propagation direction.
